summary: Frontend testing of all 4 service pages and Method page. All features verified: hero CTA opens glassmorphic form panel, final CTA card transforms in-place to show form, intermediate CTAs (for-whom sections) trigger showFinalForm state, testimonial text-only navigation, schedule Apply buttons, Method page video background.
critical_code_review_comments: Note: Routes in misc_info were incorrect (/services/executive-coaching etc). Actual routes are /executive-coaching, /organizational-advisory, /leadership-team-facilitation, /executive-retreats. Tests were updated to use correct routes.

advisory-apply-btn and facilitation-apply-btn are conditionally rendered (hidden when showFinalForm=true). The for-whom CTA sets showFinalForm=true so the final apply btn disappears — this is correct behavior, the form is already shown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 14 features verified and passing. Routes: /executive-coaching, /organizational-advisory, /leadership-team-facilitation, /executive-retreats. Method page at /how-i-work has video background (desktop .mov). All 4 service pages have: hero CTA (coaching/advisory/facilitation/retreat-hero-cta) opening glassmorphic panel, final CTA card (apply btn data-testids: coaching/advisory/facilitation/retreat-apply-btn) transforming in-place, click-outside closing the form. MeditationRetreat: testimonial-nav-0/1/2 present, 0 portrait images, retreat-apply-{i} schedule buttons work. For-whom CTAs (advisory-for-whom-cta, for-whom-unified-cta) trigger showFinalForm=true.

test_results.TF_final_cta_card_transform: PASS (form visible from for-whom CTA trigger)
test_results.Method_video_background: PASS - video element with .mov source found
